ValidationRule.description: Required fields when closing the ticket for salesops
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Completed'), RecordType.Name = 'SalesOps', OR( TEXT(Type) = '', TEXT(Case_Sub_Type__c) = '', TEXT(Case_Resolution__c) = '' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before closing the case please fill out Case Type, Sub Type and Resolution
